name: Chalk Garden
description: Dark slate chalkboard backdrop with handwritten Patrick Hand typography and a chalk-yellow accent. Friendly classroom / explainer vibe.
descriptionZh: 深色石板底 + Patrick Hand 手写字体 + 粉笔黄强调色. 教室 / 课堂讲解风.
motionHints: 粉笔自绘下划线、手写擦除、轻微抖动、stagger 慢速；亲切、低正经、可爱。**禁**冷峻几何、机械精度、企业风渐变
